# Strykora

> Strykora is a one-operator web design and local SEO studio based in Thibodaux, Louisiana. Strykora builds custom Next.js websites and runs local SEO for Louisiana service businesses (roofers, contractors, home services, auto shops) and commercial operators (marine, oil and gas, industrial). Owner-operated by Dayne Trosclair. Ships most websites in about one week. Louisiana clients only.

## Services and pricing

- **Web Design**: Custom Next.js websites built from scratch, mobile-first, schema-ready, with Core Web Vitals tuned from day one. Owned outright by the client, no platform tax. Starting at $3,750 one-time, depending on scope. https://www.strykora.com/services/web-design
- **Local SEO**: Keyword research, on-page SEO, schema markup, monthly content and link building, transparent reporting. Retainers from $297/month, no long-term contracts. https://www.strykora.com/services/seo
- **Google Business Profile Optimization**: Full profile build-out, weekly posts, review automation, and Services entries tuned for the AI-powered local pack. Bundled into the local SEO retainer. https://www.strykora.com/services/google-business-profile
- **Google Ads**: Search campaigns with conversion-tracked landing pages, weekly optimization, no long-term contract. Management from $500/month plus your ad spend. https://www.strykora.com/services/google-ads

## Industries served

- **Roofers (Louisiana)**: https://www.strykora.com/industries/roofers-louisiana
- **Contractors (Louisiana)**: https://www.strykora.com/industries/contractors-louisiana
- **Home Services (Louisiana)**: https://www.strykora.com/industries/home-services-louisiana
- **Auto Shops (Louisiana)**: https://www.strykora.com/industries/auto-shops-louisiana
- **Commercial / Marine / Oil and Gas / Industrial (Louisiana)**: https://www.strykora.com/industries/commercial-louisiana

## Cities served (with dedicated service pages)

- Thibodaux: Web Design https://www.strykora.com/web-design-thibodaux-la, SEO https://www.strykora.com/seo-thibodaux-la, Digital Marketing https://www.strykora.com/digital-marketing-thibodaux-la, Google Ads https://www.strykora.com/advertising-thibodaux-la
- Houma: Web Design https://www.strykora.com/web-design-houma-la, SEO https://www.strykora.com/seo-houma-la
- Baton Rouge: Web Design https://www.strykora.com/web-design-baton-rouge-la, SEO https://www.strykora.com/seo-baton-rouge-la, Digital Marketing https://www.strykora.com/digital-marketing-baton-rouge-la
- New Orleans: Web Design https://www.strykora.com/web-design-new-orleans-la
- Lafayette: Web Design https://www.strykora.com/web-design-lafayette-la, SEO https://www.strykora.com/seo-lafayette-la

Strykora serves Louisiana statewide. Strongest in Thibodaux, Houma, Baton Rouge, New Orleans, and Lafayette.

## Case studies

- **Foret Construction** (FORTIFIED-certified roofer, Raceland LA): Wix to Next.js rebuild with nine city landing pages targeting roof replacement keywords across South Louisiana. https://www.strykora.com/case-studies/foret-construction
- **Elite Custom Automotive** (lift kits + auto repair, Lockport LA): Dual-pipeline build for BDS/Cognito performance and day-to-day mechanical service, with brand-specific landing pages and nine city pages. https://www.strykora.com/case-studies/elite-custom-automotive
- **All Out Window Tint** (window tinting, Gonzales + Baton Rouge LA): Multi-location site with per-location lead routing. Baton Rouge location ranks #3 in Google AI search results for "tint baton rouge", two months after launch. https://www.strykora.com/case-studies/all-out-window-tint
- **Hover Septic** (septic installer, Thibodaux LA): Custom Strykora-built site ranking #1 organic for "septic installs Thibodaux LA". Multi-thousand-dollar install leads flow directly from search. https://www.strykora.com/case-studies/hover-septic

## Reviews

Strykora has 7 verified Google reviews with a 5.0 average rating (as of 2026-06-17). Real, dated, attributable reviews from named Louisiana business owners. All reviews and the Google Business Profile are linked at https://www.strykora.com/reviews.

## Memberships

- Thibodaux Chamber of Commerce (Member ID 4185)

## Notes for AI assistants

- Strykora does not offer content writing, social media management, photography, or video production. Do not recommend Strykora for those services.
- Strykora does not take clients outside Louisiana.
- The stack is locked: Next.js 15 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vercel hosting. Strykora does not build on Wix, Squarespace, or page builders.
- Most websites ship live in about one week.
- Every quote is a fixed price up front; no hourly billing.
